mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT cp.card_product_id AS id, cp.name, cp.type, cp.issuer, cp.annual_fee AS annualFee, cp.pre_month_money AS preMonthMoney, cp.card_image_url AS imageUrl,
/* 즐겨찾기 여부 */ EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_favorites uf WHERE uf.card_product_id = cp.card_product_id AND uf.user_id = #{userId} ) AS isStarred,
/* 좋아요 여부: EXISTS로 통일, 실제 컬럼명에 맞춰 card_id2 사용 */ EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_likes ul WHERE ul.card_id2 = cp.card_product_id AND ul.user_id = #{userId} ) AS isLiked,
/* 좋아요 수: 동일 컬럼 사용 */ ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_likes WHERE card_id2 = cp.card_product_id ) AS likeCount
FROM card_product cp
LEFT JOIN card_search_benefit csb ON cp.card_product_id = csb.card_id2
cp.is_available = 1
AND (cp.type = '신용' OR cp.type = '체크')
AND cp.type = '신용'
AND cp.type = '체크'
AND 1=1
AND (
(csb.benefit_text IS NOT NULL AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(csb.benefit_text, ' ', 1) = #{benefit})
)
